{{CargoClone
|name=Brawler Zhang Fei
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=164
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=For Round 1, RUSH DMG +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=When Enemy HP > 80%, Ignore DEF +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=When Enemy HP > 80%, Ignore DEF +1.5%
|}}
